name: Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder Diagnosis Codes (Combined)
description: ICD-10-CM codes for schizophrenia, schizoaffective disorder, and bipolar disorder combined into a single value set. Used in diabetes screening for schizophrenia/bipolar (SSD/SMD), metabolic monitoring for antipsychotics, and cardiovascular monitoring measures for patients with serious mental illness.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
